To think that some people use Quartz to teach their classes, write notes for their PhD thesis, and organize their day-to-day knowledge just continues to astound me. In any case, I just want y'all to know I appreciate you :) If Quartz is useful to yo...

entries.summary: Minor Changes - Add FakeTimers advanceAsync(ms) to t.useFakeTimers() . Like advance , it walks pending timers in time order and fires them, but yields to microtasks between each firing so promise continuations (and any timers they schedule) can settle before the next firing is processed.
